# Khipu.Net

> SUNAT Peru Electronic Invoicing library for .NET 10. Complete port of Greenter PHP with 100% parity. Supports SOAP and GRE REST API, 9 document types, UBL 2.1 XML generation, XMLDSig signing, CDR parsing, 1710 error codes, HTML reports, QR codes, PDF export, and 33 validation constraint loaders. 409 tests passing.

Install: `dotnet add package Khipu.Net`
Framework: net10.0
License: MIT

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/getting-started.md): Installation, company setup, SOAP vs GRE REST, first invoice
- [Invoices](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/invoices.md): Factory and Builder patterns, tax types, payment terms, detractions
- [Credit/Debit Notes](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/credit-debit-notes.md): Notes with reason codes (Catalogo 09/10)
- [Summaries](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/summaries.md): Daily summaries, voided documents, async CDR polling
- [Tax Calculator](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/tax-calculator.md): IGV, ISC, IVAP, detractions, rounding, amount in words
- [Signing & Sending](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/signing-and-sending.md): X.509 signing, SunatService, SOAP, GRE REST API, CDR parsing, error codes
- [Validation](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/validation.md): Engine, field validators, 33 constraint loaders
- [API Reference](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/api-reference.md): Complete reference for all namespaces, classes, methods

## Architecture

- Khipu.Data: 9 document models, entities, enums, generators (zero deps)
- Khipu.Xml: 9 XML builders (UBL 2.1) + 8 parsers (XML to object)
- Khipu.Ws: SunatSoapClient (SOAP) + GreClient (REST/OAuth2) + CdrReader + 1710 error codes
- Khipu.Core: InvoiceBuilder, InvoiceFactory, TaxCalculator, XmlSigner, HtmlReport, QrGenerator, PdfExporter
- Khipu.Validator: DocumentValidationEngine + FieldValidators + 33 ConstraintLoaders
